page_title: Top Secret Unit-04 Disappeared - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Rapport Comics on 10 December 1996. http://rei.in.coocan.jp/evabooks/tada4.html 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4897992346
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4897992341
